title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Vivi, Unknown person #3, Kaido, Saint Charlos as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
